parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: If you want to change web content package, input "UPDATE"(web content only)

parameters.name: refreshInterval
parameters.description: Refresh interval of web content. Format is "hh:mm:ss"(web content only)

parameters.name: startPage
parameters.description: Start page name of web content such as "index.html"(web content only)

parameters.name: webContentName
parameters.description: Name of web content(web content only)

basicDirectChannel.description: 1;chkAtvDtv(0:false, 1:true);chkAirCable(0:false, 1:true);tv_channel_major_channel;tv_channel_minor_channel[Channel] button on display list tab. (Modification is only allowed with TV or DTV inpusource

ppcColortone.description: if ppc_colortone not null - 1: cool1, 0: cool2, 2: normal, 3: warm1, 4: warm2, 80: off

ppcGamma.description: 0: natural, 1: gammaMode1, 2: gammaMode2, 3: gammaMode3, 4: gammaMode4, 5: gammaMode5, 17: -1, 18: -2, 19: -3, 20: -4, 21: -5, 32: custom

ppcHdmiBlackLevel.description: if Pv_hdmi_black_level value is null - 0: low, 1: normalelse 1: normal, 0: low

ppcMagicBright.description: 16: entertainment, 17: internet, 18: text, 19: custom, 20: advertisement, 21: information, 22: calibration, 32: shopAndMall_video, 33: shopAndMall_text, 34: officeAndSchool_video, 35: officeAndSchool_text, 36: terminalAndStation_video, 37: terminalAndStation_text, 38: videowall_video, 39: videowall_text

pvDigitalnr.description: 1: on, 0: off, 2: mdc_medium, 3: mdc_high, 4: autho, 5: mdc_auto_visual

pvHdmiBlackLevel.description: if pv_hdmi_black_level value is null : not supported - 0: low, 1: normalelse 0: normal, 1: low, 2: auto

pvMode.description: 0: dynamic, 1: mdc_pv_standard, 2: mdc_pv_movie, 3: custom, 4: mdc_pv_natural, 5: calibration, 32: shopAndMall_video, 33: shopAndMall_text, 34: officeAndSchool_video, 35: officeAndSchool_text, 36:terminalAndStation_video, 37: terminalAndStation_text, 38: videowall_video, 39: videowall_text

pvSize.description: 1: 16:9, 4: zoom, 5: zoom1, 6: zoom2, 9: screen_fit_just_scan1, 11: 4:3,12: wide_fit, 49: wide_zoom, 13: custom, 14: mdc_smart_view1, 15: mdc_smart_view2, 32: psize_original_ratio

soundMode.description: 0: mdc_sound_standard, 1: mdc_sound_music, 2: mdc_sound_movie, 3: mdc_sound_speech, 4: custom, 5: amplify

cabinetGroupSetting.description: List of cabinet group settings for specific devices of type LED. Refer to V2DeviceCabinetGroupConf

preconfigFailed.description: Number of presets that failed to deploy specific device

preconfigSuccess.description: Number of presets that successfully deployed specific device

preconfigVersion.description: Preset settings version for specific device

tagConditionIds.description: This field have to be filled if tagType is VARIABLE.

tagIds.description: Tag id list to assign to device.

errorCode.description: Predefined error code number. Refer to 'RestExceptionCode' class.

errorMessage.description: Predefined error message. Refer to 'RestExceptionCode' class.

url.description: Information on the URL that the error occurred.

tagId.description: Tag Id, It will be set automatically

cabinetIPAddress.description: Cabinet IP address of specific device

childNumber.description: Sub group number of the cabinet group of specific device

index.description: Index of group of cabinets for a specific device
